These conditions present an imminent public health hazard. Meridian Manufacturing Co. is directed to immediately suspend production, remediate all identified deficiencies, and submit documentary evidence of compliance within 21 days. A re-inspection will follow. Non-compliance will result in mandatory facility closure, product seizure, and imposition of fines of $150,000 per violation per day.

label: Contract Dispute
notice: NOTICE OF PAYMENT DEFAULT TO: Pinnacle Construction Ltd. FROM: TerraForm Engineering DATE: April 15, 2024 Pursuant to Section 12.5 of the Master Services Agreement executed on January 15, 2022, this letter constitutes formal notice that Pinnacle Construction Ltd. is in default of its payment obligations. Outstanding invoices totaling $75,000 remain unpaid, now 60 days past due. TerraForm Engineering demands immediate remittance of all overdue amounts plus accrued interest at the rate of 2.5% per annum. Unless payment is received within 10 business days, TerraForm Engineering will exercise its right to suspend all services and initiate arbitration proceedings.

label: Regulatory Compliance
notice: NOTICE OF REGULATORY VIOLATION TO: Pinnacle Lending Solutions Inc. FROM: Office of Financial Regulation DATE: December 2, 2024 Following an inspection conducted on October 1, 2023, Office of Financial Regulation has determined that Pinnacle Lending Solutions Inc. is in violation of Section 2.9 of the Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX). Specifically, Pinnacle Lending Solutions Inc. has failed to maintain adequate records of customer transactions as mandated by applicable regulations. You are hereby directed to implement all required remediation measures within 30 calendar days of this notice. Failure to comply will result in the imposition of civil penalties of up to $200,000 per day of continued non-compliance. A written remediation plan must be submitted to this office by within 15 business days.

label: Intellectual Property Claim
notice: NOTICE OF TRADE SECRET MISAPPROPRIATION TO: ContentStream Media FROM: Artisan Copyright Trust DATE: May 22, 2024 Artisan Copyright Trust hereby provides notice that ContentStream Media has misappropriated trade secrets belonging to Artisan Copyright Trust in violation of the Defend Trade Secrets Act (18 U.S.C. § 1836). The misappropriated information includes proprietary algorithms, manufacturing processes, and customer data compiled over 3 years of investment. This information was wrongfully acquired through a former Artisan Copyright Trust employee now working at ContentStream Media. Artisan Copyright Trust demands an immediate halt to any use of such information, preservation of all relevant records, and a written response within 7 days, failing which an application for emergency injunctive relief will be filed.

label: Intellectual Property Claim
notice: DOMAIN NAME DISPUTE NOTICE TO: Digital Audio Networks FROM: SoundMark Entertainment DATE: December 2, 2024 SoundMark Entertainment is the owner of the federally registered trademark 'STREAMLINE' and the domain name cloudpeak.net. Digital Audio Networks has registered and is using the domain 'ProSuite Enterprise v4.0', which is confusingly similar to SoundMark Entertainment's trademark and domain. This constitutes cybersquatting under the Anti-Cybersquatting Consumer Protection Act (15 U.S.C. § 1125(d)). SoundMark Entertainment demands immediate transfer of the disputed domain to SoundMark Entertainment without compensation. If voluntary transfer is not confirmed within 7 days, SoundMark Entertainment will initiate proceedings under ICANN's Uniform Domain Name Dispute Resolution Policy (UDRP) and seek all available legal remedies.

label: Contract Dispute
notice: NOTICE OF FORCE MAJEURE DISPUTE TO: Horizon Enterprises Group FROM: Cascade Software Inc. DATE: May 22, 2024 Cascade Software Inc. writes to formally contest Horizon Enterprises Group's invocation of the force majeure clause under Section 7.1 of the Supply Agreement dated November 1, 2022. The circumstances cited by Horizon Enterprises Group do not meet the contractual threshold for force majeure relief, as supply chain disruptions of this nature were foreseeable and should have been mitigated. Accordingly, Cascade Software Inc. holds Horizon Enterprises Group liable for delivery failures resulting in losses of $75,000. A written response is required within 21 business days, or this matter will be escalated to arbitration.

label: Intellectual Property Claim
notice: NOTICE OF UNAUTHORIZED USE OF BRAND ASSETS TO: Global Brands Inc. FROM: TradeMark Shield LLC DATE: April 7, 2025 TradeMark Shield LLC has become aware that Global Brands Inc. is using TradeMark Shield LLC's registered logos, brand imagery, and copyrighted marketing materials without authorization in its advertising campaigns. This unauthorized use falsely implies an endorsement or affiliation between the parties that does not exist. Such conduct constitutes trademark infringement, copyright infringement, and false advertising under applicable federal and state law. TradeMark Shield LLC demands immediate removal of all such materials from Global Brands Inc.'s website, social media, and printed collateral within 10 hours of this notice, and reserves all rights to seek damages and attorney's fees.
